inputs.prompt: Medium shot of an orange tabby cat wearing a tailored navy blue business suit with red tie, behind a professional news anchor desk. The cat is straightening his tie with one paw, staring straight through the camera with devastating calm. Behind him a large screen shows simple white text on black background reading 1300+ CIVILIANS. No graphics, no memes, just the number. Lower-third chyron banner reads: THAT NUMBER IS NOT CONTENT. Studio lighting is professional broadcast blue and warm key light. The mood is somber and heavy. Photorealistic, cinematic, 4K.
